sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75827" key="ou)/ligc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὔλιγξ</orth>, acc. pl. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὔλιγγας</foreign>, <sense id="n75827.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὤλιγγας</ref> </xr> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔλιγγας, ὤριγγας</etym>) in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:67" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.67</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
